title: Dense Smoky Ukrainian Rest-meat Stew
description: A hearty, savory stew originating from Ukraine, featuring slow-cooked meat and the unique flavor of Szechuan peppercorns.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion, carrot, and celery, and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the rest-meat and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the Szechuan peppercorns, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the tomato paste and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the red wine and bring to a boil.
Add the beef broth and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Add the bay leaves and thyme, and cover the pot.
Transfer the pot to the oven and cook, stirring occasionally, until the meat is tender, about 2 hours.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Remove the bay leaves and serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Serve with crusty bread or over egg noodles, if desired.
